judge_result.short_rationale: Answer includes all required source-backed actions in the correct sequence: remove contaminated clothing/shoes, wash skin with plenty of water for at least 15 minutes, and contact a physician or poison control immediately after rinsing starts. It also preserves the do-not warning about not keeping contaminated clothing on.
